items.headline: Consumer prices rose 3.3% in March, as energy prices spiked due to Iran conflict

items.headline: Powell, Bessent discussed Anthropic's Mythos AI cyber threat with major U.S. banks
items.whyItMatters: Broad-market potential because it can shift expectations around rates, growth, inflation, or policy.

items.headline: Kevin Warsh Fed chair confirmation plan hits snag as nomination hearing is delayed
items.whyItMatters: Broad-market potential because it can shift expectations around rates, growth, inflation, or policy.
items.summary: President Trump's nomination of Kevin Warsh as Federal Reserve chair already faced a hurdle by Sen. Thom Tillis over a probe of current Chair Jerome Powell.
